payload.recommendation: Insufficient evidence to recommend; commission proposed experiment.

payload.experiment: Run orthogonal in vivo validation for TSC2 in disease-relevant model.

payload.value: SCN11A/Nav1.9 — TTX-resistant VGSC in peripheral nociceptors; small-molecule inhibitor in scope.
Moat ranked Nav1.9 #7 — ultra-slow persistent current under-resolved by the optical-EP assay.
Boltz-2 pKd 7.2, prob_binder 0.88; Nav1.5 cross-pKd 6.9 (~2x vs >100x needed).
SCN11A SAFE class — LoF tolerable, no clinical tox; cleanest profile in the panel.
CACNA2D1 CRITICAL (black-box respiratory depression); NGF CRITICAL (RPOA, NDA rejected 2021, PMID 37652258) — removed from ranking.
CardioGenAI: moderate hERG, elevated Nav1.5 risk.
No clinical-stage Nav1.9 inhibitor exists — SAFE is provisional; >100x Nav1.5 selectivity unproven.

payload.recommendation: Advance SCN11A / Nav1.9 to a focused cardiac-selectivity de-risking experiment — not yet to a full program. Structure any external deal as option / milestone-heavy.
payload.confidence: Biology: HIGH. Overall program: CONDITIONAL on the selectivity gate.

payload.experiment: Resolve Nav1.9's persistent current in Quiver's oEP assay (the signal the moat under-detected) AND demonstrate >100× functional Nav1.5 sparing for a lead chemotype — closing the active-learning loop on the moat's own blind spot.

payload.value: RHEB — small GTPase directly downstream of TSC2; activates mTORC1. Modality TBD (small molecule vs ASO/degrader).
Moat ranked RHEB #7 (subtle GTPase functional signature) despite near-perfect mechanistic coupling.
2nd most common somatic cause of FCD IIb; PPI-to-mTOR 0.999.
Boltz-2 pKd 5.4, prob_binder 0.41 (weak); ATOMICA dock -6.1, shallow solvent-exposed pose — no deep pocket.
ADMET-AI: clean tox (low DILI/hERG), BBB borderline — moot until ligandability solved.
PPARD CRITICAL — GW501516 multi-species carcinogenicity, FDA/EMA holds — removed.
MTOR = everolimus incumbent: WARNING immunosuppression/growth impairment, 50,182 FAERS (PMID 31335226) — set aside, not a discovery.
RHEB MONITOR-class, no clinical inhibitor (safety inferred); small-molecule ligandability hard -> ASO/degrader. DEPDC5 (best Mendelian genetics) abstained — intractable GATOR1 reactivation.

payload.recommendation: Pursue RHEB as a genetic-medicine (ASO / degrader) platform bet on the TSC2–mTOR axis — a research commitment, not a small-molecule program.
payload.confidence: Biology: HIGH. Modality / feasibility: CONDITIONAL — reframed from inhibitor to genetic medicine.

payload.experiment: Show RHEB knockdown/degradation normalizes the oEP excitability phenotype the moat under-resolved, with a node-specific safety margin vs pan-mTOR and a credible CNS-delivery (BBB) plan for the chosen modality.

payload.value: LRRK2 (leucine-rich repeat kinase 2) — brain-penetrant small-molecule kinase inhibitor in scope for Parkinson's.

LRRK2 G2019S gain-of-kinase-function is the most common monogenic cause of PD — supports kinase inhibition. (Capture pending: the Target Validation portion scrolled off the live run; not PMID-cited here yet.)
LRRK2 kinase inhibition causes AT2 pneumocyte lamellar-body vacuolation in NHPs (GNE-7915/GNE-0877); recapitulates the Lrrk2-KO lung phenotype → on-target, not compound-specific.
A human primary AT2 air-liquid-interface model reproduces dose-dependent lamellar-body enlargement → the lung signal likely translates to humans.
LRRK2 regulates AT2 lysosomal function and surfactant-phospholipid processing — the mechanism of the lung liability.
Urinary di-22:6-BMP decreases with LRRK2 inhibition in NHP and Lrrk2-KO → translatable pharmacodynamic / safety biomarker.
Rodents do not show the lung phenotype at pharmacologically relevant doses; NHP + human in vitro are the only predictive models.
Reversibility of the AT2 lung effect on a drug holiday, and the therapeutic window vs CNS target engagement, are unproven.

payload.recommendation: Advance LRRK2 kinase inhibition only behind a lung-safety de-risking package; structure any external deal milestone-heavy on the lung gate.
payload.confidence: Biology: HIGH. Overall program: CONDITIONAL on the lung gate.

payload.experiment: A human iPSC-AT2 lamellar-body dose-response + reversibility assay, paired with urinary di-22:6-BMP, to define the therapeutic window between CNS target engagement and the lung effect before FIH. (Also capture the LRRK2 genetics via the EMET Target Validation workflow to close the B1 known-unknown.)

payload.data: moat under-detected the lung lysosomal window

payload.note: moat under-detected the lung lysosomal window
